title: lonicera chrysantha var. subtomentosa
intro: Lonicera chrysantha var. subtomentosa, also known as Honey Gold Honeysuckle, is a perennial flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Caprifoliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lonicera chrysantha var. subtomentosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Lonicera chrysantha var. subtomentosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
